summary: While the role nominally offers predictable morning hours, the fundamental requirement for high-level biostatistics and complex mathematical modeling directly conflicts with your preference for procedural, protocol-driven work. The 'high' stress rating and high-stakes nature of the data mean that your areas of struggle—math and logical deduction—would be the primary sources of daily pressure. Furthermore, the risk of unpredictable, grueling workloads during public health crises makes this role unsustainable for a candidate prioritizing personal wellbeing and low-stress career growth.
